name: Accounts Receivable
description: Amounts owed by clients for completed work

name: Retainage Receivable
description: Retained amounts from client progress billings

name: Vehicles – Net of Depreciation
description: Company trucks and vehicles at book value

name: Accounts Payable
description: Amounts owed to subcontractors and vendors

name: Accrued Payroll
description: Wages earned but not yet paid

name: Income Taxes Payable
description: Federal and state income taxes payable

name: Line of Credit
description: Revolving credit facility with US Bank

name: Retained Earnings
description: Cumulative net income retained in business

name: Current Year Net Income
description: Net income for current fiscal year

name: Equipment Rental Income
description: Revenue from equipment rentals to third parties

name: Direct Labor
description: Field labor costs directly on projects

name: Equipment Costs – Direct
description: Equipment operating costs allocated to projects

name: Interest Expense
description: Interest on debt and credit facilities

name: Gain – Loss on Equipment Sale
description: Gains or losses on asset disposals

name: Income Tax Expense
description: Washington B&O tax and federal income taxes
